column26:
*User story:*
As a customer, I want to securely log into the portal so that I can access my account

*Business value:* Enables self-service access

*Acceptance criteria:*

* Credentials accepted
* Authentication succeeds
* Invalid login shows error

*Dependencies:* None

*User story:*
As a customer, I want to verify my identity so that I can securely access account details

*Business value:* Security + compliance

*Acceptance criteria:*

* Customer submits identifiers
* System validates correctly
* Access granted only if matched

*Dependencies:*

* Customer Login

*User story:*
As a customer, I want to recover access if I’m locked out so that I can continue my journey

*Business value:* Prevents drop-off

*Acceptance criteria:*

* Recovery flow available
* Identity re-check required
* Access restored

*Dependencies:*

* Customer Login 
* Customer Identity Verification

*User story:*
As a customer, I want to see my balance so that I understand what I owe

*Business value:* Reduces inbound contact

*Acceptance criteria:*

* Balance displayed
* Matches backend data
* Loads successfully

*Dependencies:*

* Customer Login
* Customer Identity Verification

*User story:*
As a customer, I want to see past activity so that I don’t repeat information

*Business value:* Reduces duplication

*Acceptance criteria:*

* Shows past interactions
* Includes timestamps
* Accurate data display

*Dependencies:*

* Customer Login 
* Customer Identity Verification

*User story:*
As a customer, I want to know what to do next so that I can act without contacting support

*Business value:* Improves self-service completion

*Acceptance criteria:*

* Next action shown
* Based on account status
* Updates when status changes

*Dependencies:*

* Customer Login 
* Customer Identity Verification

*User story:*
As a customer, I want to commit to a payment date so that I can manage my debt

*Business value:* Improves recovery rates

*Acceptance criteria:*

* Date selection available
* Commitment stored
* Confirmation shown

*Dependencies:*

* Customer Login 
* Customer Identity Verification

*User story:*
As a customer, I want to select a payment plan so that I can repay over time

*Business value:* Increases recoveries

*Acceptance criteria:*

* Plan options shown
* Plan validated
* Plan saved

*Dependencies:*

* Customer Login 
* Customer Identity Verification

*User story:*
As a customer, I want confirmation of my agreement so that I know it’s recorded

*Business value:* Reduces disputes

*Acceptance criteria:*

* Confirmation displayed
* Details summarised
* Stored in system

*Dependencies:*

* Set Promise-to-Pay 

OR

* Set Up Payment Plan

*ser story:*
As the system, I want to schedule follow-ups so that commitments are not missed

*Business value:* Improves consistency

*Acceptance criteria:*

* Follow-up created automatically
* Date based on rules
* Visible in system

*Dependencies:*

* Set Promise-to-Pay 

OR

* Set Up Payment Plan

*User story:*
As the system, I want to route complex cases so that agents handle exceptions

*Business value:* Prevents failed self-service

*Acceptance criteria:*

* Rules identify complex cases
* Case assigned to agent
* Status updated

*Dependencies:*

* View Outstanding Balance
* View Account History

*User story:*
As an agent, I want full context on escalated cases so that I don’t repeat work

*Business value:* Reduces admin effort

*Acceptance criteria:*

* Customer history visible
* Account status visible
* Previous actions shown

*Dependencies:*

* Route Complex Cases to Agent 
* Log Customer Actions 
* View Account History 
* View Outstanding Balance

*User story:*
As a customer, I want to know when my case is escalated so that I understand next steps

*Business value:* Reduces confusion

*Acceptance criteria:*

* Notification sent
* Reason explained
* Next steps shown

*Dependencies:*

* Route Complex Cases to Agent

*User story:*
As the system, I want to log all customer actions so that activity is traceable

*Business value:* Enables audit + reporting

*Acceptance criteria:*

* Actions recorded
* Timestamp stored
* Retrievable data

*Dependencies:*

* Set Promise-to-Pay 
* Select Payment Plan

*User story:*
As a manager, I want to see workload and follow-up performance so that I can manage operations

*Business value:* Improves visibility

*Acceptance criteria:*

* Shows follow-ups completed
* Shows workload
* Shows escalations

*Dependencies:*

* Log Customer Actions
* View Outstanding Balance 
* View Account History
